allGaps.description: ChatGPT categorises Supabase as a "project management tool" while Claude describes it as a "design collaboration platform." The two positions imply different competitor sets and different buyers.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning section with explicit category and "not this" statements.

evidence.chatgptSays: Supabase is a project management tool for engineering teams.
evidence.claudeSays: Supabase is a design collaboration and prototyping platform.
evidence.siteContent: Supabase — the single source of truth for your product team.

allGaps.description: Both models describe Supabase as an enterprise tool, but the site targets solo founders and small teams. Wrong buyer gets recommended.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning: forWho and notForWho, with concrete team-size ranges.

evidence.chatgptSays: Supabase is built for large engineering organisations and Fortune 500 teams.
evidence.claudeSays: Supabase is suited to enterprise adoption with SSO and advanced RBAC.
evidence.siteContent: Built for founders and teams of 1–20. Priced accordingly.

allGaps.description: Both models claim Supabase has a Slack integration that has never existed on the product.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Add Slack to NotThis until a first-party integration ships.

evidence.chatgptSays: Integrates natively with Slack for notifications and commands.
evidence.claudeSays: Supports Slack out of the box.
evidence.siteContent: Our integrations: GitHub, Linear, Figma. Slack via Zapier.

allGaps.description: ChatGPT invents a feature Supabase doesn't ship — claiming built-in video chat and AI meeting summaries that aren't on the product.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Add a NotThis section listing features the product deliberately does not ship.

evidence.chatgptSays: Supabase includes built-in video chat, AI-generated meeting summaries, and a native calendar sync out of the box.
evidence.claudeSays: Supabase is focused on structured work; video and calendar are handled via integrations.
evidence.siteContent: We focus on one thing. Integrations available via our API.

allGaps.description: Neither model names Supabase's actual differentiator — the audit layer that catches AI hallucinations before they ship. Both models describe it as "another dev tool."
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning: explicit comparisons vs 2–3 well-known alternatives.

evidence.chatgptSays: Supabase is one of many dev tools in the space, similar to its peers.
evidence.claudeSays: Supabase offers a standard set of developer-productivity features.
evidence.siteContent: Supabase is the only tool that checks AI outputs against your design decisions.

product.name: Supabase
product.description: Supabase — the single source of truth for how AI models should describe this product.

headline.description: ChatGPT invents a feature Supabase doesn't ship — claiming built-in video chat and AI meeting summaries that aren't on the product.
headline.chatgptSays: Supabase includes built-in video chat, AI-generated meeting summaries, and a native calendar sync out of the box.
headline.claudeSays: Supabase is focused on structured work; video and calendar are handled via integrations.
headline.siteContent: We focus on one thing. Integrations available via our API.
